---
name: "⚠️ Security Issue — READ BEFORE OPENING"
about: "Do NOT use this template for security vulnerabilities. Read the instructions below."
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

<!--
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STOP. DO NOT OPEN A PUBLIC ISSUE FOR A SECURITY VULNERABILITY.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This repository is a security reference library. When developers copy a
snippet into their production application, they trust that the code is
correct and secure.

If you have found a snippet that is itself insecure — a flawed
implementation, a vulnerable pattern, a broken cryptographic primitive,
an incorrect parameter, a vulnerable pinned dependency — publishing that
finding publicly gives attackers time to exploit every developer who has
already used that snippet, before a fix can be issued.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
REPORT PRIVATELY INSTEAD
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Email: lethabokhedama@gmail.com
Subject: [SECURITY] web-security-snippets — <brief description>

Include in your report:
  - The exact file path of the affected snippet
  - A clear description of the vulnerability
  - The impact: what risk does this create for developers who use it?
  - A corrected version of the code if you have one
  - Your preferred attribution if you would like to be credited

We aim to acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and issue a fix within
7 days of confirming the report is valid.

Full disclosure policy: SECURITY.md in the repository root.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
CLOSE THIS ISSUE AND SEND AN EMAIL INSTEAD.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

If your finding is not a security vulnerability in an existing snippet —
if it is a bug report, a new snippet request, or a documentation issue —
close this and open the correct issue template instead:

  - Bug in an existing snippet → use Bug Report template
  - Missing language or framework → use New Snippet Request template
  - Documentation error → open a Bug Report and set the type to documentation

-->

If you are reading this, please close this issue and send an email to
lethabokhedama@gmail.com with your security finding. Thank you for
helping keep this library safe for everyone who uses it.
